name: lenser_dna.json
core_identity: Single large central lens-eye symbolizing intelligence, emotion, and light

materials.lens: multi-element glass with iris coating and micro-dust speckles
materials.emitter: translucent polycarbonate for chest core and antenna tip

shell.shape: perfect sphere with shallow front bezel
shell.panel_lines: two subtle service seams at 10 and 2 o’clock

lens_eye.appearance: stacked camera optics with visible aperture blades and ring reflections
lens_eye.blink_method: quick iris stop-down to f/8 then reopen

ears_cylindrical.detail: rear vent slit and tiny status LED facing back

antenna.stem: thin graphite rod, 4 mm diameter, 5 cm height
antenna.base: flush magnetic socket with dark rubber skirt
antenna.tip_behavior: idle 5% glow, ramps to 40% on emphasis

torso.shell: rounded barrel with soft abdominal groove
torso.abdomen: elastic silicone ring for breathing motion

chest_core.design: circular glowing element inspired by Iron Man’s arc reactor
chest_core.behavior: soft pulse 60–80 BPM, syncs with lens bloom on emotion

cape.style: short cape with high collar and soft hem

views.front: Lens centered, cylindrical ears visible symmetrically, antenna vertical, cape collar flares left/right, core centered.
views.right: Right ear shows full cylinder and rear vent; cape overlaps to back; lens rim depth visible; arm seams and elbow boot visible.
views.left: Mirror of right; left hip seam and power-port hatch indicated by subtle seam.
views.back: Cape forms teardrop; antenna base socket visible; two oval maintenance panels; heel soles show traction ring; ear LEDs visible.
views.top: Perfect circular head with antenna at dead center; ears align on a straight lateral axis; cape collar forms shallow crescent.

rig_points.head: head_ctrl at sphere center
rig_points.lens: iris_ctrl for aperture, focus_ctrl for depth bloom
rig_points.antenna: antenna_fk at base, tip_light intensity channel
rig_points.ears: ear_R_fk and ear_L_fk for subtle tilt
rig_points.cape: cloth_sim with 3 pin constraints at collar

visual_rule: Mascot must have only one central eye-lens; no additional eyes or optical elements allowed anywhere on the head or body.

body_modifications.antenna_tip: heart-shaped light orb with soft pulse
body_modifications.lens_shape: slightly oval aperture with smooth reflections

cape.style: flowing asymmetric cut with short front

views_delta.front: core glows pink; cape overlaps into soft S-curve at hips
views_delta.left: skirt panel visible as light flare behind thigh
views_delta.top: heart-orb tip visible ahead of antenna stem
